summary: Excellent soundboard capture of the legendary 7/13/84 Greek show – blistering Scarlet‑Touch‑Fire, soaring Space→Wheel and a celebrated Dark Star encore.
review: The recording is a crisp, well‑balanced soundboard (SBD) that lets the band’s high‑octane second set shine.  Jerry’s guitar is on fire, Phil’s bass booms, Brent’s keyboards sparkle in the Space/​Wheel stretch and the Scarlet Begonias→Touch of Grey→Fire sequence races at warp speed, all capped by a memorable Dark Star encore.

ai_rating.rationale: Over 50 reviews, the vast majority are 4‑5 stars and praise both performance (especially the second set) and recording quality; only a handful of modest criticisms keep the rating just below perfect.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp, clear SBD with good instrument separation. Minor quirks noted – occasional vocal mic drop on Stella Blue and a brief vocal strain – but overall a very listenable mix.

standout_songs: Scarlet Begonias → Touch of Grey → Fire on the Mountain
show_quality.setlist_flow: The first set is uneven, but the second set erupts with high‑energy jams and seamless transitions; the Dark Star encore provides a perfect climax.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Repeatedly called ‘Junkie Jerry’, on fire, guitar scorching, vocals strained yet powerful.
band_member_comments.Phil: Bass described as booming, tight, and a highlight of the night.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent’s keyboards praised in Space→Wheel and overall trippy texture.
band_member_comments.Drums: Bill and Mickey noted for solid playing; Mickey’s bell work on The Wheel highlighted.
